'''âv-h-zh''' ('''kavahazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unblindfold|unblindfold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unblindfold|unblindfold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-h-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kavahazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivahazh|thivahazh]] || [[word:jivahazh|jivahazh]] || [[word:shivahazh|shivahazh]] || [[word:kivahazh|kivahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvahazh|thuthuvahazh]] || [[word:jujuvahazh|jujuvahazh]] || [[word:shushuvahazh|shushuvahazh]] || [[word:kukuvahazh|kukuvahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvahazh|thuvahazh]] || [[word:juvahazh|juvahazh]] || [[word:shuvahazh|shuvahazh]] || [[word:kuvahazh|kuvahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvahazh|thuvahazh]] || [[word:juvahazh|juvahazh]] || [[word:shuvahazh|shuvahazh]] || [[word:kuvahazh|kuvahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevahazh|thevahazh]] || [[word:jevahazh|jevahazh]] || [[word:shevahazh|shevahazh]] || [[word:kevahazh|kevahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovahazh|thothovahazh]] || [[word:jojovahazh|jojovahazh]] || [[word:shoshovahazh|shoshovahazh]] || [[word:kokovahazh|kokovahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahazh|thovahazh]] || [[word:jovahazh|jovahazh]] || [[word:shovahazh|shovahazh]] || [[word:kovahazh|kovahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahazh|thovahazh]] || [[word:jovahazh|jovahazh]] || [[word:shovahazh|shovahazh]] || [[word:kovahazh|kovahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvahazh|thĂŠvahazh]] || [[word:jĂŠvahazh|jĂŠvahazh]] || [[word:shĂŠvahazh|shĂŠvahazh]] || [[word:kĂŠvahazh|kĂŠvahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavahazh|thathavahazh]] || [[word:jajavahazh|jajavahazh]] || [[word:shashavahazh|shashavahazh]] || [[word:kakavahazh|kakavahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavahazh|thavahazh]] || [[word:javahazh|javahazh]] || [[word:shavahazh|shavahazh]] || [[word:kavahazh|kavahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavahazh|thavahazh]] || [[word:javahazh|javahazh]] || [[word:shavahazh|shavahazh]] || [[word:kavahazh|kavahazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavahazh|shavahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavahazh|goshavahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavahazh|gokishavahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavahazhnĂŒ|shavahazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavahazhnknĂŒ|goshavahazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahazhnĂŒ|gokishavahazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavahazhshĂ«|shavahazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkshĂ«|goshavahazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavahazhshĂ«|gokishavahazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahazhro|shavahazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkro|goshavahazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahazhro|gokishavahazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahazhmu|shavahazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkmu|goshavahazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahazhmu|gokishavahazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavahazhsher|shavahazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavahazhnksher|goshavahazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavahazhsher|gokishavahazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavahazhng|shavahazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkng|goshavahazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavahazhng|gokishavahazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavahazhya|shavahazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkya|goshavahazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavahazhya|gokishavahazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavahazhyam|shavahazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkyam|goshavahazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavahazhyam|gokishavahazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahazhnĂŒshĂ«|shavahazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavahazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavahazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-

|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahazhnknĂŒro|goshavahazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahazhnĂŒro|gokishavahazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahazhnĂŒmu|shavahazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahazhnknĂŒmu|goshavahazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahazhnĂŒmu|gokishavahazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavahazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavahazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavahazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahazhshĂ«ro|shavahazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkshĂ«ro|goshavahazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahazhshĂ«ro|gokishavahazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahazhshĂ«mu|shavahazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkshĂ«mu|goshavahazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahazhshĂ«mu|gokishavahazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahazhronĂŒ|shavahazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkronĂŒ|goshavahazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahazhronĂŒ|gokishavahazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahazhroshĂ«|shavahazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkroshĂ«|goshavahazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahazhroshĂ«|gokishavahazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahazhromu|shavahazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkromu|goshavahazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahazhromu|gokishavahazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahazhmunĂŒ|shavahazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkmunĂŒ|goshavahazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahazhmunĂŒ|gokishavahazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahazhmushĂ«|shavahazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkmushĂ«|goshavahazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahazhmushĂ«|gokishavahazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahazhmuro|shavahazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahazhnkmuro|goshavahazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahazhmuro|gokishavahazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
